column8: Real GDP at chained PPPs (expenditure side). National accounts benchmark.
Real GDP at chained PPPs (output side). Cross-check of rgdpe.
Population (in thousands). Denominator for per-capita derivations.
Number of persons engaged (in thousands). Labor input.
Average annual hours worked by persons engaged. Total labor input = emp * avh.
Human capital index based on years of schooling and returns to education. PWT 10.01 (Feenstra et al. 2015) quality dimension.
Real consumption of households + government + non-profits. Demand-side GDP cross-check.
Capital depreciation (in 2017 USD). Subset of gross capital formation.
Total factor productivity (TFP) level at current PPPs. PWT 10.01 productivity measure.
Capital stock (in 2017 USD). Net capital at chained PPPs.
TFP at constant national prices (TFP level). Direct TFP measure without PPP conversion.
